meta.title: The part of China's military parade we SHOULD be talking about
meta.description:
On Wednesday, China held a massive military parade in Beijing’s Tiananmen Square, showcasing a long list of new weapons, drones, aircraft, and more, in a spectacle meant to both commemorate the 80th anniversary of the end of World War II, and maybe more importantly, to garner media publicity around the globe for the nation’s new top-of-the-line Defense technologies.
